description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on workflow dispatch, push to tags matching v*, and pull requests to branches master, main, and dev. Use a single windows-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up .NET 8.0.x, restores dependencies, publishes the project, downloads and includes additional data and updater files, zips the output, uploads it as an artifact, and drafts a release with the zip file if the workflow is triggered by a tag push event.
